title: SmartMap
description: A Multi tenant web application for managing and visualizing product distribution data. Built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Fiber, Golang, and PostgreSQL, it provides a modern and responsive interface for users to analyze and optimize their distribution networks effectively.

title: Bandulan Landing Page
description: A landing page for Bandulan, a distribution company. Built with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS, it features a modern design and responsive layout to showcase the company's services and products effectively.
A personal portfolio website built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Vite. It features a clean and modern design to showcase projects, skills, and experience effectively.
title: Portofolio
Sales Force Automation (Bandulan)
description: A mobile application for Bandulan's sales force automation, built with Flutter and Firebase. It provides features for managing sales activities, tracking customer interactions, and improving overall sales efficiency.

title: Distribution Management System (Bandulan)
description: A landing page for Bandulan, a distribution company. Built with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS, it features a modern design and responsive layout to showcase the company's services and products effectively.

title: IDEABOX BNI
description: A platform for BNI's IDEABOX program, built with jQuery and Bootstrap. It provides a user-friendly interface for submitting and managing ideas, fostering innovation within the organization.

title: IDEABOX MANDIRI (MIX PITCH)
description: A platform for Mandiri's IDEABOX program, built with jQuery and Bootstrap. It provides a user-friendly interface for submitting and managing ideas, fostering innovation within the organization.

title: Pskuy
description: A Web application for allowing gamers to find the best place for renting console games. Built with Next.js, React, and tRPC, it features a modern design and responsive layout to provide users with an easy way to find and rent console games.

title: Periodic Table
description: A simple periodic table application built with JavaScript. It provides an interactive interface for users to explore the elements, their properties, and their relationships in the periodic table.
